adds.rationale: Rocket Lab delivered a record launch cadence in 2022 including two classified NRO national-security missions and has imminent US launch capability from Wallops Island, establishing it as the leading small-sat launch provider at the onset of the commercial space buildup phase named in the investor thesis.

news_evidence.summary: Rocket Lab successfully launched NROL-162 on July 13, 2022, delivering NRO's national security payload under the RASR responsive-space contract.
Rocket Lab hit a cadence record with the NROL-199 Electron launch on August 4, 2022, completing three launches in just over five weeks.
Rocket Lab reschedules its first Electron launch from Wallops Island to January 2023; the US launch site is operationally ready.

adds.rationale: The IFR World Robotics Report released October 2022 showed global industrial robot installations exceeding 500,000 units for the second consecutive record year, confirming structural demand; the 2022 tech-sector selloff has compressed BOTZ's price, creating a buildup-phase entry point consistent with the investor thesis's 'invest early while cheap' rule.

news_evidence.summary: IFR World Robotics Report 2022: global industrial robot installations exceeded 500,000 units for the second consecutive year; global robotics market valued at over $80 billion.
IFR 'Top 5 Robot Trends 2022': accelerating adoption of collaborative robots, AI-guided automation, and service robots across manufacturing and logistics.

adds.rationale: Cameco, the world's second-largest uranium producer, raised its 2022 revenue guidance 14% on post-Ukraine uranium price recovery, and the Inflation Reduction Act signed in August 2022 created new production and investment tax credits for nuclear that materially improve SMR and existing-plant economics — marking early-surge conditions in the fission renaissance wave.

news_evidence.summary: Cameco raised its 2022 revenue guidance ~14% to a $1.9B high-end after Q1 2022 earnings, citing stronger uranium prices.
The Inflation Reduction Act, signed August 2022, creates a nuclear production tax credit for existing plants and a 30% investment tax credit for new nuclear construction.
NuScale Power commenced trading on NYSE under 'SMR' on May 3, 2022, becoming the world's first publicly traded pure-play SMR company.

rationale_overall: This rebalance fills the watchlist from 5 to the maximum of 8 by adding one ticker each in the three highest-priority next-wave buckets named in the investor profile: rockets and spacecraft (RKLB), robotics (BOTZ), and nuclear (CCJ). The four existing AI-wave tickers are retained as the current dominant wave; the AI bucket is now at its 4-ticker diversity cap. RKLB enters on a 2022 cadence record and operationally ready Wallops US launch site; BOTZ as the most liquid established robotics ETF with the 2022 bear providing a cheaper entry; CCJ as the direct uranium-price beneficiary of the post-Ukraine squeeze and the IRA's new nuclear incentives at early-surge pricing.
